title: AdvancedDrawers
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/5OYgb0GnuEU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


A plugin inspired by the mod Drawers. 
Currently on Beta, you may find some bugs.

# Configuration

You have a config.yml file in which you can edit all the drawers. You are not limited by the amount of part you want, you can add new parts by yourself just by following the same format. And it is super easy to understand. We have 3 axis, the vertical is the Y and you can edit it such as : 0 <Y < 1 with 1 is the highest point of the block and 0 the lowest. And it is the same pattern for the remaining ones.​

![Configuration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/469c66ee76a4491a82f24a6036328fd8f6b77dfb.png)

# Commands
/drawer (drawer type) (target) - Give a specific drawer - drawer.give
/component (type) - Give a specific drawer - drawer.component.give
/drawer bulk (world) - Delete all drawers from a world - drawer.manage
/drawer freeze (world) - Freeze all drawers in world - drawer.manage
/drawer craft (type) - Open an inventory which display the craft of the drawer - drawer.display.craft

Permissions:

    drawer.freeze.use : Use drawers while frozen
